description:
Fast, affordable text-to-image model, optimized for graphic design and photography. For higher quality, use https://poe.com/Ideogram-v2A

Note: Supported file type: JPEG, WebP and PNG. 

Optional parameters:
Aspect to set the aspect ratio. Select from 16:9, 16:10, 3:2, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 2:3, 10:16, 9:16. Default to 1:1.
Style to specify a style (one of `GENERAL`, `REALISTIC`, `DESIGN`, `3D RENDER` and `ANIME` default: `GENERAL`.)
